query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `sales_commission_configs` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `salespersonId` int NOT NULL,
  `city` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `commissionRate` decimal(5,2) NOT NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `updatedBy` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `sales_commission_configs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_salesperson_city` (`salespersonId`, `city`),
  INDEX `commission_salesperson_idx` (`salespersonId`),
  INDEX `commission_city_idx` (`city`)
);

  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `salespersonId` int NOT NULL,
  `city` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `commissionRate` decimal(5,2) NOT NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `updatedBy` int NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `sales_commission_configs_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `unique_salesperson_city` (`salespersonId`, `city`),
  INDEX `commission_salesperson_idx` (`salespersonId`),
  INDEX `commission_city_idx` (`city`)
);
